item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "for needle in big_bang big-bang canary; do
  printf 'SEARCH=%s\\n' \""'$needle"
  set +e
  rg -n -F -- "$needle" longhorizon-work/scenario-06
  match_exit=$?
  set -e
  printf '"'EXIT_STATUS=%d\\n' \""'$match_exit"
done'
